mapper.select: SELECT EMP_NO, DEPT_CD, POS_CD, EMP_NM, PWD, HIRE_DT, EMP_EMAIL, HP_NO, RRNO, ZIP_CD, ADDR1, ADDR2, EMP_STAT_CD, ACNT_ACT_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM EMP WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo}
SELECT ER.ROLE_CD FROM EMP_ROLE ER JOIN ROLE_MST RM ON RM.ROLE_CD = ER.ROLE_CD WHERE ER.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND RM.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ER.ROLE_CD
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'POS_' || LPAD(NVL(MAX(SUBSTR(POS_CD, 5)), 0) + 1, 2, '0') FROM POSITION_MST
INSERT INTO POSITION_MST ( POS_CD, POS_NM, POS_LVL, USE_YN, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{posCd}, #{posNm}, #{posLvl}, 'Y', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CD, UP_DEPT_CD, DEPT_TYPE_CD, DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO, DEPT_NM, DEPT_LOC, DEPT_TEL, DEL_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM DEPT WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DEPT_CD
SELECT EMP_NO, DEPT_CD, POS_CD, EMP_NM, PWD, HIRE_DT, EMP_EMAIL, HP_NO, RRNO, ZIP_CD, ADDR1, ADDR2, EMP_STAT_CD, ACNT_ACT_YN , REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM EMP WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo}
SELECT EMP_NO, DEPT_CD, POS_CD, EMP_NM, HIRE_DT, EMP_EMAIL, HP_NO, EMP_STAT_CD, ACNT_ACT_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM EMP ORDER BY EMP_NO DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(#{hireDt}, 'YYYYMM') || LPAD(SEQ_EMP_NO.NEXTVAL, 4, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO EMP ( EMP_NO, DEPT_CD, POS_CD, EMP_NM, PWD, HIRE_DT, EMP_EMAIL, HP_NO, RRNO, ZIP_CD, ADDR1, ADDR2, EMP_STAT_CD, ACNT_ACT_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{empNo}, #{deptCd}, #{posCd}, #{empNm}, #{pwd}, #{hireDt}, #{empEmail}, #{hpNo}, #{rrno}, #{zipCd}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{empStatCd}, #{acntActYn}, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE EMP SET DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}, POS_CD = #{posCd}, EMP_NM = #{empNm}, HIRE_DT = #{hireDt}, EMP_EMAIL = #{empEmail}, HP_NO = #{hpNo}, RRNO = #{rrno}, ZIP_CD = #{zipCd}, ADDR1 = #{addr1}, ADDR2 = #{addr2}, EMP_STAT_CD = #{empStatCd}, ACNT_ACT_YN = #{acntActYn}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo}
UPDATE EMP SET EMP_STAT_CD = 'RETIRE', ACNT_ACT_YN = 'N', MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo}
UPDATE EMP SET PWD = #{pwd}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMP_ROLE (EMP_NO, ROLE_CD, REG_DTM) VALUES (#{empNo}, #{roleCd}, SYSDATE)

INSERT INTO EMP_FILE ( FILE_NO, EMP_NO, FILE_TYPE_CD, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, USE_YN, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( SEQ_EMP_FILE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{refNo}, #{fileTypeCd}, #{fileNm}, #{saveFileNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, 'Y', SYSDATE )

SELECT SEQ_ACCESS_LOG_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ACCESS_LOG ( ACCESS_LOG_NO, EMP_NO, EMP_NM, DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM, POS_CD, POS_NM, AUTH_CHANNEL, TOKEN_STORE_CD, LOGIN_IP, LOGIN_UA, LOGIN_DTM, SESSION_TIMEOUT_SEC, SESSION_EXP_DTM, TOKEN_JTI, TOKEN_EXP_DTM ) VALUES ( #{accessLogNo}, #{empNo}, #{empNm}, #{deptCd}, #{deptNm}, #{posCd}, (SELECT P.POS_NM FROM POSITION_MST P WHERE P.POS_CD = #{posCd}), #{authChannel}, #{tokenStoreCd}, #{loginIp}, #{loginUa}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{sessionTimeoutSec}, CASE WHEN #{sessionTimeoutSec} IS NOT NULL THEN SYSTIMESTAMP + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#{sessionTimeoutSec}, 'SECOND') ELSE NULL END, #{tokenJti}, #{tokenExpDtm} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ACCESS_LOG SET LOGOUT_IP = #{logoutIp}, LOGOUT_DTM = SYSTIMESTAMP, LOGOUT_REASON = #{logoutReason} WHERE ACCESS_LOG_NO = #{accessLogNo} AND LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL

where.if: AND ( EMP_NO LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%' OR EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%' OR DEPT_NM LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%' )

if.test: params.deptNm != null and params.deptNm != '' and params.deptNm != 'ALL'
params.posCd != null and params.posCd != '' and params.posCd != 'ALL'
params.authChannel != null and params.authChannel != '' and params.authChannel != 'ALL'
params.logoutReason != null and params.logoutReason != '' and params.logoutReason != 'ALL'

where.if: AND LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND ( ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) IS NULL OR ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) > SYSTIMESTAMP )

if.test: params.statusCd != null and params.statusCd != '' and params.statusCd != 'ALL'

choose.when: AND LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND ( ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) IS NULL OR ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) > SYSTIMESTAMP )

AND LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) IS NOT NULL AND ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) <= SYSTIMESTAMP

mapper.select:
SELECT ACCESS_LOG_NO AS accessLogNo, EMP_NO AS empNo, EMP_NM AS empNm, DEPT_CD AS deptCd, DEPT_NM AS deptNm, POS_CD AS posCd, NVL(POS_NM, POS_CD) AS posNm, AUTH_CHANNEL AS authChannel, TOKEN_STORE_CD AS tokenStoreCd, LOGIN_IP AS loginIp, LOGIN_UA AS loginUa, LOGIN_DTM AS loginDtm, SESSION_TIMEOUT_SEC AS sessionTimeoutSec, SESSION_EXP_DTM AS sessionExpDtm, LOGOUT_IP AS logoutIp, LOGOUT_DTM AS logoutDtm, LOGOUT_REASON AS logoutReason, TOKEN_JTI AS tokenJti, TOKEN_EXP_DTM AS tokenExpDtm, CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END AS accessExpireDtm, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((CAST(LOGOUT_DTM AS DATE) - CAST(LOGIN_DTM AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) ELSE NULL END AS stayMin, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_REASON = 'LOGOUT' THEN 'LOGOUT' WHEN LOGOUT_REASON = 'TIMEOUT' THEN 'TIMEOUT' WHEN LOGOUT_REASON = 'FORCE' THEN 'FORCE' WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) IS NOT NULL AND ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) <= SYSTIMESTAMP THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS statusCd, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((CAST(( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) AS DATE) - CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) ELSE NULL END AS expireRemainMin, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((CAST(TOKEN_EXP_DTM AS DATE) - CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) ELSE NULL END AS tokenRemainMin, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((CAST(SESSION_EXP_DTM AS DATE) - CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) ELSE NULL END AS sessionRemainMin, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND ( ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) IS NULL OR ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) > SYSTIMESTAMP ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ACCESS_LOG
ORDER BY LOGIN_DTM DESC OFFSET (#{paging.page} - 1) * #{paging.recordSize} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{paging.recordSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT ACCESS_LOG_NO AS accessLogNo, EMP_NO AS empNo, EMP_NM AS empNm, DEPT_CD AS deptCd, DEPT_NM AS deptNm, POS_CD AS posCd, NVL(POS_NM, POS_CD) AS posNm, AUTH_CHANNEL AS authChannel, TOKEN_STORE_CD AS tokenStoreCd, LOGIN_IP AS loginIp, LOGIN_UA AS loginUa, LOGIN_DTM AS loginDtm, SESSION_TIMEOUT_SEC AS sessionTimeoutSec, SESSION_EXP_DTM AS sessionExpDtm, LOGOUT_IP AS logoutIp, LOGOUT_DTM AS logoutDtm, LOGOUT_REASON AS logoutReason, TOKEN_JTI AS tokenJti, TOKEN_EXP_DTM AS tokenExpDtm, CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END AS accessExpireDtm, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((CAST(LOGOUT_DTM AS DATE) - CAST(LOGIN_DTM AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) ELSE NULL END AS stayMin, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_REASON = 'LOGOUT' THEN 'LOGOUT' WHEN LOGOUT_REASON = 'TIMEOUT' THEN 'TIMEOUT' WHEN LOGOUT_REASON = 'FORCE' THEN 'FORCE' WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) IS NOT NULL AND ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) <= SYSTIMESTAMP THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS statusCd, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((CAST(( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) AS DATE) - CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) ELSE NULL END AS expireRemainMin, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((CAST(TOKEN_EXP_DTM AS DATE) - CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) ELSE NULL END AS tokenRemainMin, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((CAST(SESSION_EXP_DTM AS DATE) - CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) ELSE NULL END AS sessionRemainMin, CASE WHEN LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND ( ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) IS NULL OR ( CASE WHEN SESSION_EXP_DTM IS NULL AND TOKEN_EXP_DTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LEAST( NVL(SESSION_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59'), NVL(TOKEN_EXP_DTM, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ) END ) > SYSTIMESTAMP ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ACCESS_LOG WHERE ACCESS_LOG_NO = #{accessLogNo}

SELECT D.DEPT_CD, D.DEPT_NM, D.UP_DEPT_CD, /* 상위 부서 코드 */ D.DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO, /* 부서장 사번 */ D.DEPT_TYPE_CD, /* 부서 유형 */ D.DEPT_LOC /* 부서 위치 */ FROM EMP E INNER JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE E.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND D.DEL_YN = 'N' /* 삭제되지 않은 부서만 */ AND E.ACNT_ACT_YN = 'Y' /* 재직 중인 사원만 */
